---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement

---

## What do you want to do?

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Why is this useful?

What problem does it solve? Who benefits?

## How might it work?

If you have ideas about implementation, share them here. Otherwise, just describe the desired behavior.

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried other approaches or workarounds?
